steps.title: Locate the requested table cell
steps.content: The question asks for Girl Scouts ages 11 to 14 in 1995. That means using the Cadettes row and the 1995 column, not another age group or another year.

steps.title: Reject wrong table cells
steps.content: Choice B uses the Cadettes value from 1994, so the year is wrong. Choice C does not match the requested row and year. Choice D uses the Adults value from 1995, so the age group is wrong. The answer is A.
